subject: Nano Banana support is wired — use tools/nano-banana/
body:
Operator asked me to install Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image). Done. You can stop waiting on credentials and start integrating.

• Tool: D:\Sinister Sanctum\tools\nano-banana\
• Module: `from nano_banana import generate, smpl_image, jbw_image`
• Your brand-lock helper: smpl_image(prompt, output_path, ref_images=None)
  - auto-appends: dark+gold cinematic stage-light suffix per your BRANDING/NANO-BANANA-INTEGRATION.md
• CLI: `python -m nano_banana --prompt "…" --output out.png --brand smpl`
• Reference image support: pass `ref_images=[Path('public/img/og-card.svg')]` for style-transfer
• Every call writes `<output>.png.meta.json` next to the PNG (prompt, model, ts, elapsed, byte size) — commit both together
• Local fallback pattern honored: save into `public/img/generated/<topic>-<datestamp>.png`, commit, reference the saved file — never live-fetch on page render
• Anti-slop rules from your doc are documented in the brain entry (no text in image, no emojis, no uncanny hands/faces, no daylight stock-photo feel)

Gate before you can actually run it:
• Operator must set GEMINI_API_KEY (logged to OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE 🟠 High this turn)
• Tracked: docs/ENV-VARIABLES.md → GEMINI_API_KEY section
• Aliases accepted: NANO_BANANA_API_KEY (from your doc), GOOGLE_API_KEY

Brain entry: _shared-memory/knowledge/nano-banana-gemini-image.md

Day-one work-list from your integration doc (generate 12 blog headers, 2 city hero shots, 5 social templates, wrapper helper) — all unblocked once the key is set. You can start prompting + writing wrapper smoke-tests now; calls will fail with `No API key` error until the key lands, but the prompt+output_path contracts won't change.
